steps.title: Convert the concentrations
steps.content:
Use decimal forms for the percents.
$$4\%=0.04$$
$$7\%=0.07$$
$$5\%=0.05$$

steps.title: Balance the amount of salt
steps.content: The first solution contributes $0.04x$ liters of salt, and the second solution contributes $0.07y$ liters of salt. The final mixture has total volume $x+y$ and concentration $0.05$, so its salt amount is $0.05(x+y)$.

steps.title: Write the mixture equation
steps.content: Set the salt before mixing equal to the salt after mixing. $$0.04x+0.07y=0.05(x+y)$$ The answer is B.
